operator_action_titles: Sync NTP; clock must not be >30 s ahead of true time
Watch operator notices via Beacon Phase II-A
Do NOT expect PoPC, Beacon II-B, Beacon III, or Memory-Lock at block 12000
If your blocks are rejected after block 12000, check the troubleshooting list
_note: This is the PUBLIC mirror of config/v13_release_candidate.json. Detailed reasons, evidence keywords, and step-level details live in the in-repo config and in docs/V13_RELEASE_CANDIDATE.md + docs/V13_MINER_OPERATOR_CHECKLIST.md. The on-chain V13 hardfork itself does not depend on this JSON; this file is published purely for human / operator convenience.
